Footer.companyDescription: Bangladesh’s trusted marketplace for buying and selling everything—from electronics and vehicles to property and services.

About.heroSubtitle: Recycle Mart is Bangladesh's leading online marketplace for buying and selling recycled goods. We're building a community where pre-loved items find new homes.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Bangladesh's leading online marketplace for buying and selling recycled and second-hand goods. We make it easy to give pre-loved items a new life.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A future where every product gets a second chance, reducing waste and promoting a circular economy in Bangladesh.

community.title: Our Community
community.description: Building a safe, trusted, and eco-friendly marketplace that benefits both our users and the environment.

About.missionDesc: Bangladesh's leading online marketplace for buying and selling recycled and second-hand goods. We make it easy to give pre-loved items a new life.
About.visionDesc: A future where every product gets a second chance, reducing waste and promoting a circular economy in Bangladesh.
About.communityDesc: Building a safe, trusted, and eco-friendly marketplace that benefits both our users and the environment.
About.storyPara1: Founded with a vision to revolutionize how Bangladesh trades, Recycle Mart has grown from a simple idea into a thriving ecosystem of sustainable commerce. We believe that every item has value beyond its first use.
About.storyPara2: Our platform connects thousands of buyers and sellers across the country, facilitating secure transactions and promoting the reuse of quality goods. By extending the lifecycle of products, we're collectively reducing environmental impact while making quality items accessible to everyone.
About.ctaSubtitle: Start your sustainable journey today. Whether you're looking to declutter or find a hidden gem, we've got you covered.

Contact.heroSubtitle: Have questions or need assistance? Our team is here to help you. Reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
Contact.infoSubtitle: Fill out the form or use our contact details to get in touch with our team.
Contact.successMessage: Thank you! We have received your message. We will contact you soon.
Contact.errorMessage: Sorry, your message could not be sent. Please try again later.

FAQ.heroSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about buying, selling, and safety on Recycle Mart. We're here to make your experience as smooth as possible.
FAQ.sellQ: How do I sell an item on Recycle Mart?
FAQ.sellAns: To sell an item, simply create an account, click on the 'Post Ad' button, uploading clear photos of your item, and provide a detailed description. Once submitted, your ad will be reviewed and published.
FAQ.feeQ: Is there a fee to post an ad?
FAQ.feeAns: Posting verified ads for personal items is free. However, we offer premium features and vendor accounts for businesses which may carry a small fee for enhanced visibility.
FAQ.contactQ: How can I contact a seller?
FAQ.contactAns: You can use our secure in-app chat feature to message sellers directly. For safety, we recommend keeping all communications within the Recycle Mart platform.
FAQ.prohibitedAns: We do not allow the sale of illegal goods, weapons, hazardous materials, or explicit content. Please refer to our Terms & Conditions for a full list of prohibited items.
FAQ.suspiciousQ: How do I report a suspicious ad?
FAQ.suspiciousAns: If you find an ad that violates our policies or looks suspicious, please click the 'Report' button on the ad page. Our team will investigate immediately.
FAQ.editQ: Can I edit my ad after posting?
FAQ.editAns: Yes, you can edit your ad at any time from your dashboard. Go to 'My Ads', select the item you want to modify, and click 'Edit'.
FAQ.footerSubtitle: If you couldn't find the answer you were looking for, please feel free to contact our support team or check our safety guidelines.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.priority: Protecting your personal information is our top priority
Privacy.sec1Text: When you use Recycle Mart, we collect certain information about you to help improve our services.
Privacy.sec2Text: Your information is primarily used to ensure the safety and functionality of our platform.
Privacy.sec3Text: We use advanced encryption and security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission is 100% secure.
Privacy.sec4Text: You have full control over your data on our platform. You can request to change or delete your information at any time.
Privacy.footerSubtitle: Contact our privacy team to learn more about how your personal data is handled.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.priority: Please read our terms carefully before using our services
Terms.sec1Text: By accessing and using Recycle Mart, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
Terms.sec2Text: When using our platform, you must adhere to the following rules:
Terms.sec3Text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. Report any suspicious activity immediately.
Terms.sec4Text: You are responsible for the content you post. We do not allow the following:
Terms.sec5Text: Recycle Mart shall not be held liable for any damages or disputes arising between users. We only provide the platform.
Terms.footerSubtitle: If you have any doubts about our terms, please feel free to contact our support team.

Safety.heroSubtitle: At Recycle Mart, we are committed to providing a safe and secure marketplace. Follow these guidelines to ensure a smooth and protected experience.

public.title: Meet in Public
public.desc: Always choose busy, well-lit public places for transactions.

friend.title: Bring a Friend
friend.desc: Whenever possible, take someone with you or tell them your location.

inspect.title: Inspect Thoroughly
inspect.desc: Check the item's condition and authenticity before making payment.

payment.title: Secure Payments
payment.desc: Avoid sharing bank details or paying via untraceable methods.

gut.title: Trust Your Gut
gut.desc: If a deal feels too good to be true, it probably is. Stay cautious.

verified.title: Verified Users
verified.desc: Prefer dealing with users who have good ratings and history.

Safety.reportingDesc: If you encounter any suspicious activity or have concerns about a user or listing, please report it to us immediately. We take all reports seriously to keep our community safe.
Safety.emergencyDesc: In case of an emergency or immediate threat, please contact your local authorities first. Our team is also available for assistance with non-urgent safety issues.

Ads.title: Buy & Sell Anything in Bangladesh
Ads.showingAds: Showing {count} curated ads — discover the best deals tailored to you.
Ads.whySellDesc: Reach millions of verified buyers across Bangladesh with simple tools.

Lottery.watchLiveTitle: Watch Draws Live on Facebook & YouTube
Lottery.transparencyDesc: We ensure 100% transparency. Every draw is streamed live. You can verify the results instantly. Join our community to get notified.
